name: maya-c2-full-arc
walkthrough_voiceover: I made a story for my five-year-old. The next day, a free two-minute preview landed in my inbox. I cried before it finished. So I bought the full fifteen minutes. Twenty four ninety nine. That night I played it for her. The hero, of course... was Maya.

end_card.headline: A story that knows their name.
end_card.subline: Free 2-min preview · £24.99 if you love it
